archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) - Modified Indian Civic Theme

core_principles: Authority & Trust: Government-grade aesthetic avoiding boring bureaucracy. Uses deep navy for structure and saffron/emerald for action and resolution.
Editorial Density: High information density without clutter. Uses sharp grid systems and typographic hierarchy to organize complex data.
Civic Pride: Monumental hero sections and strong typographic voice using serif headers.
anti_patterns: No generic purple or teal 'tech startup' gradients.
No rounded, bubbly borders (keep border radius tight, max 8px).
No fully transparent headers over images (use glassmorphism or solid).

headings.usage: H1, H2, monumental stats, featured callouts

body.usage: Body text, UI elements, dashboard labels

primary.name: Civic Navy
primary.usage: Headers, primary buttons, major structural elements, H1/H2 text

accent_1.name: Saffron Energy
accent_1.usage: Urgent calls to action, active states, heatmaps

accent_2.name: Emerald Resolution
accent_2.usage: Success states, resolved markers, positive growth charts

grid_systems.landing: Bento 'Tetris' Grid - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8 with asymmetric spans
grid_systems.dashboard: 'Control Room' Grid - grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Dense data, full height children.

surfaces.dashboard_card: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

charts.styling: No heavy grid lines, minimal axis ticks, tooltip with Glassmorphism

shadcn_overrides.card: Remove default heavy shadows. Use 1px border border-slate-200. Flat background.
shadcn_overrides.button: No rounded-full unless iconic. Use crisp rounded-md. Primary button: bg-[#0A192F] hover:bg-[#0A192F]/90 text-white.
shadcn_overrides.tabs: Override fixed h-9. Make it h-auto, clear typography.

motion.hover: Subtle -translate-y-1 on cards, opacity shifts on buttons. transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out.
motion.page_load: Staggered fade-in for feed items and dashboard widgets (framer-motion).

pages_to_build: Landing Page (Hero, Live Ticker, Stats Bento, How It Works, Map Teaser)
Public Feed (Social-style issue cards, infinite scroll feel, filters)
Submit Issue (Multi-step form, upload, GPS mockup)
Interactive Map View (Stylized India SVG, heat zones, clustering mockup)
Hierarchical Dashboard (Recharts, pincode to state drill-down)

hero_backgrounds.description: Off-white wrinkled paper texture for editorial background feel.

illustrations.description: Abstract map of India to use as background element.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install lucide-react, recharts, framer-motion, clsx, tailwind-merge.
Implement language switcher toggle (UI only) in the header (EN / HI / TE).
Use standard semantic HTML sections with generous padding. Apply 'bg-[#FAF9F6]' to the main body.
Do NOT use generic Vercel/SaaS gradients. Stick to the Civic Navy, Saffron, and Emerald accent colors strictly.
Create the India map view as an interactive SVG or standard stylized layout using the provided abstract map image as a base.
Mock all data: issues, user profiles, stats, and dashboard recharts data.
Ensure the hero section uses Fraunces for the main title, with tracking-tight to create a monumental civic feel.
